candidate_llm_application: LLM expert-route permutation: route tokens through expert permutation sequences; permutation-spectrum allocates expert order per layer.

results.title: Moe Expert Routing / Token Permutation Routing: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on MoE expert routing / token permutation routing, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (MoE expert routing / token permutation routing); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (campanology terms vs LLM terms).
results.matched_effect_cluster: MoE expert routing / token permutation routing
